meaning: adj.(玻璃或金属)表面上有图案装饰的
examples: This algorithm can also enable poles in the closed loop system to be configurated arbitrarily.
The link layer processing chip S19202 produced by AMCC corporation need to be configurated before being used.
Fantastic, incredible, and sometimes frightening shapes, a world configurated by a mad god—and sometimes a world also of strange surrealist beauty.
